title: Rename device - Rename
scenario: Renaming a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device via Device Settings > General does not reflect the updated name on the Home screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile Android app with the Poly Bluetooth audio device already connected.
On the Home screen, tap the connected device's name or gear icon to enter Device Settings.
Tap the device's official name field.
Enter a new desired name for the device.
Tap Done to confirm the name change.
expected: The device name is updated in Device Settings and also reflected on the Home screen.
